shellCommands.command: cd /home/user/workspace && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200

cd /home/user/workspace && sed -n '1,220p' app/page.tsx && printf '
---LAYOUT---
' && sed -n '1,220p' app/layout.tsx && printf '
---DB---
' && sed -n '1,220p' lib/db.js && printf '
---NEXT---
' && sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts

cd /home/user/workspace && python - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('app/page.tsx')
s = p.read_text()
s = s.replace("  revalidateTag('products');\n", "  revalidateTag('products', 'max');\n")
p.write_text(s)
PY
npm run build
